subcodes.first_line: Verily, know that I previously saw in a dream in that House [the Kaaba?] where I was sitting that in its midst was a masoleum on which was a domed sepulcher. When I approached the masoleum, I saw Muhammad al-Jawwad exit from the sepulcher
subcodes.first_line_orig: و انک لتعلم انی رایت فی المنام من قبل فی ذلک البیت الذی انا کنت جالسا فیه ان وسطه مرقد
subcodes.subjects: @accounts of dreams and visions, @family of Muhammad; early figures in Islam, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
